_notes: Vercel cron temporarily disabled — Hobby tier limits crons to daily, which defeats the 10-minute calendar-scan purpose. Re-add the crons[] block once on Pro: { path: /api/cron/scan-calendars, schedule: '*/10 * * * *' }. Until then the endpoint can be hit by an external scheduler (GitHub Actions, cron-job.org, Uptime Robot, etc.) with Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET.
